title: Attempt Test Case Generation as a Read-Only User Without Generate Permission
description: Verify that a user with read-only/viewer role cannot trigger test case generation and receives a meaningful permission-denied error message.
expected_result: The Generate Test Cases button is disabled for the read-only user, a tooltip clearly explains the permission restriction, and any attempt to bypass via URL is met with an access-denied response.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page as the viewer user
test_steps.expected: Page loads — either access is denied with an error, or the Generate button is disabled

test_steps.action: Verify the Generate Test Cases button is disabled for the read-only user
test_steps.expected: Generate Test Cases button is disabled

test_steps.action: Hover over the disabled Generate button to check tooltip message
test_steps.expected: A tooltip or inline message appears explaining the permission restriction

test_steps.action: Verify the tooltip or permission message content
test_steps.expected: Message reads 'You do not have permission to generate test cases'

assertion.value: You do not have permission to generate test cases

test_steps.action: Attempt to directly POST to the generation API endpoint (simulate via UI if available) and verify rejection
test_steps.expected: System shows an access-denied or forbidden error page/message
